text:
(In reply to ivk from comment #0)
> "pkg audit" report about russian/wordpress vulnerability, but that report
> about "WordPress versions 4.7.4 and earlier are affected by six security
> issues"
> 
> ru-wordpress-4.9.2 is vulnerable:
> Wordpress -- multiple vulnerabilities
> WWW:
> https://vuxml.FreeBSD.org/freebsd/a5bb7ea0-3e58-11e7-94a2-00e04c1ea73d.html

fixed. run pkg audit -F
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/security/vuxml/vuln.xml?r1=459805&r2=459977&pathrev=459977
